response: **THE FOUNDATION OF FAITH**-COMMUNITIES GROW WHEN LEADERS MODEL HUMILITY AND SERVICE-TRUST IS BUILT THROUGH CONSISTENT PRESENCE AND LISTENING-**THE PRACTICE OF GATHERING**-SHARED MEALS AND WORSHIP CREATE BONDING OPPORTUNITIES FOR ALL MEMBERS-REGULAR RITUALS REINFORCE A SENSE OF BELONGING AND PURPOSE-**THE VISION OF SERVICE**-OUTWARD MISSION STRENGTHENS INTERNAL UNITY BY SHARING A COMMON GOAL-LOVE FOR NEIGHBORS TRANSFORMS GROUPS INTO VIBRANT SPIRITUAL FAMILIES
